Crystal Apple and Jury Special Award to our Visual Communication Design Student Alp Eren Tekin

The project titled “The Augmented Dictionary of Typography” prepared by our Visual Communication Design student Alp Eren Tekin within the scope of VCD402 Graduation Project was awarded the Crystal Apple and Special Jury Award in the “Publication Design” category in the “Design” field at the 34th Crystal Apple Award Ceremony.

The Augmented Dictionary of Typography met its audience for the first time on June 9, 2022 at our Visual Communication Design year-end exhibition OCULUS.

We congratulate our student and our supporting teachers.

https://mediacat.com/kristal-elma-2022-tum-kazananlar/
